title: SANCTUARY ON CURSED GROUND
subtitle: Roadside Chapel · the cane fields after dusk
epigraph_upright: The bond consciously chosen. The yes that costs. The sanctuary built one limestone block at a time on land everybody else avoids.
epigraph_reversed: The bond by default. The sanctuary nobody is sure why they built. The cursed ground that keeps its own counsel.
scene_description: The chapel sits on the only raised ground for half a mile of cane field. Inside: limestone walls, an altar, two short kneelers, a statue niche on the east wall, a bell pull in the southwest corner. The stained-glass triptych above the altar is the only colour in the room. Outside: the cane breathes.
direction_hint: Two people are about to choose each other in this room. You are not one of them. You are the witness who keeps the room.
opening_log_lines: You step inside. The temperature drops six degrees.
The votives are out. Light one.
Click [b]PHASE: ACTION[/b] anytime for the rules.
